inputs.label: Enthalpy Change (ΔH)
inputs.businessContext: Positive for endothermic, negative for exothermic reactions.

businessContext_i18n.en: Positive for endothermic, negative for exothermic reactions.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Endotermik reaksiyonlar için pozitif, ekzotermik reaksiyonlar için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Positiv für endotherme, negativ für exotherme Reaktionen.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Positive pour les réactions endothermiques, négative pour les exothermiques.
businessContext_i18n.es: Positivo para reacciones endotérmicas, negativo para exotérmicas.

inputs.label: Change in Moles of Gas (Δn)
inputs.businessContext: Difference between moles of gaseous products and reactants.

label_i18n.fr: Variation du nombre de moles de gaz (Δn)

businessContext_i18n.en: Difference between moles of gaseous products and reactants.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gaz halindeki ürünler ve reaktanların mol sayıları arasındaki fark.
businessContext_i18n.de: Differenz zwischen der Molzahl der gasförmigen Produkte und der gasförmigen Reaktanten.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Différence entre les moles de produits gazeux et de réactifs gazeux.
businessContext_i18n.es: Diferencia entre los moles de productos gaseosos y reactivos.

inputs.label: Temperature Change
inputs.businessContext: Positive for increase, negative for decrease.

businessContext_i18n.en: Positive for increase, negative for decrease.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Artış için pozitif, azalış için negatif.
businessContext_i18n.de: Positiv für Erhöhung, negativ für Verringerung.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Positive pour une augmentation, négative pour une diminution.
businessContext_i18n.es: Positivo para aumento, negativo para disminución.

inputs.label: Pressure Change
inputs.businessContext: Positive for increase, negative for decrease.

businessContext_i18n.fr: Positive pour une augmentation, négative pour une diminution.
businessContext_i18n.es: Positivo para aumento, negativo para disminución.

inputs.businessContext: Positive for increase, negative for decrease.
